name_cn:
BOOK TOTE Small
Blue and White / Suede
Has a dreamy vintage feel
The bag body features exquisite pure handmade embroidery craftsmanship
Full of texture, the 3D embroidery has a rich grain
Iconic Tiger embroidery with cowhide splicing 🌟
More business-appropriate for commuting
The bag shape is sturdier and more structured
Equipped with a shoulder strap for enhanced practicality
Capacity remains very substantial
Size: 26.5*21*14 cm
Model: 1325#
